raw_text: s opened as `file://` cannot load images from other `file://` paths in Chrome. Firefox allows it. For portable local HTML with images, use `python3 -m http.server` or embed images as base64 data URIs.

s opened as `file://` cannot load images from other `file://` paths in Chrome. Firefox allows it. For portable local HTML with images, use `python3 -m http.server` or embed images as base64 data URIs.
